sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, value DOUBLE, region VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO sales (id, value, region) VALUES (1, 100.0, 'North'), (2, 200.0, 'South'), (3, NULL, 'East'), (4, 150.0, 'West');
UPDATE sales SET value = 175.0 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT regr_avgx(value, id) AS avg_x FROM sales WHERE region IS NOT NULL;
SELECT region, regr_avgx(value, id) AS avg_x FROM sales GROUP BY region;
